# CWE-280 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-280-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

var tenantStore sync.Map

// Vulnerable: open failure falls through to admin-only delete path.
func DeleteTenant(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := "/secure/tenants/" + r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		tenantStore.Delete(r.URL.Query().Get("id"))
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		return
	}
	f.Close()
	http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
}
